# zstack_policy_route_rule (Resource)

Manages Policy Route Rule resources in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `rule_number` (Number) The rule number (priority).
- `rule_set_uuid` (String) The UUID of the rule set this rule belongs to.
- `table_uuid` (String) The UUID of the routing table.

### Optional

- `dest_ip` (String) The destination IP address or CIDR.
- `dest_port` (String) The destination port or port range.
- `protocol` (String) The protocol (TCP, UDP, ICMP, etc.).
- `source_ip` (String) The source IP address or CIDR.
- `source_port` (String) The source port or port range.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the rule.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Policy Route Rule.
